title: viola × malteana
intro: Viola × malteana, a hybrid plant species within the genus Viola, is a cross between Viola odorata and Viola riviniana. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, and its roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations to ease menstrual cramps, reduce inflammation, and lower fever. The health benefits of Viola × malteana include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, a diuretic, and an anti-inflammatory, making it effective in treating a range of conditions. Herbal preparations of Viola × malteana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
